all.critique: The logic analysis mentions accepting a 'config' in the initializer but does not detail how key beam search hyperparameters (beam size, max sequence length, length penalty factor) or task-specific options are extracted from this config. This omission could lead to ambiguity in reproducing the expected experimental behavior.

The description of converting predicted token sequences back to text assumes a 'shared vocabulary interface' without specifying its structure or how to handle special tokens (e.g., SOS, EOS, PAD) during post-processing. Clarifying this would improve the design documentation.

The beam search routine does not clarify whether it is designed for single-instance decoding or batched inputs. Addressing the ambiguity in how beam search is applied (per example versus per batch) is important to ensure consistency with the planned design.
